description: Verso: Bill of sale for a slave. Incomplete and unsigned. Dated: Monday 26 Ḥeshvan 1403 Seleucid, which is 1091 CE. Seller: Meshullam b. Hiba known as Ibn al-Shuwaykiyya (cf. T-S 20.30 and the cluster of related documents). Buyer: Moshe b. Ghālib ha-Kohen. Slave: a woman named Kitmān, born into slavery (muwallada). Price: 25 dinars.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
